LGAM

  • Capabilities
  • Business Areas
LGAM Business Areas

Planning and development

The processing of planning applications, building control, and local spatial planning.

About this area

Planning and development sits in the Business Areas layer of the Local Government Architecture Model. It covers the statutory functions that councils perform around land use, building safety, and spatial planning — from processing individual planning applications through to maintaining the local plan.

The functions within this area are defined by the LGA taxonomy under "Planning and building control" (function 99). Each function contains a set of granular services that councils deliver. This page also links to the open planning datasets published by MHCLG and the LGAM capabilities that support planning services.

Functions and services

Function areas as defined by LG Inform, with their corresponding local government services.

  • Building Control (3 services)

    Regulation of building works to ensure safety, energy efficiency, and accessibility standards are met. Includes processing of building regulations applications, inspections, and enforcement action against non-compliant works.

    Services

    • Building control
    • Building control enforcement
    • Domestic heating oil tanks
  • Development Control (27 services)

    Assessment and determination of planning applications, including full planning, outline, reserved matters, prior notifications, and lawful development certificates. Includes pre-application advice, public consultation, and planning enforcement.

    Services

    • Advertisement control
    • Brownfield land register
    • Community infrastructure levy (CIL)
    • Conservation area tree works notification
    • Development control
    • Development control enforcement
    • Discharge of planning conditions
    • Environmental Impact Assessment screening
    • Full planning applications
    • Land charges search
    • Lawful Development Certificate existing use
    • Lawful Development Certificate proposed use
    • Local development order
    • Neighbourhood development order
    • Outline planning consent
    • Planning consultation
    • Planning decision notices
    • Planning minor material amendments
    • Planning non-material amendments
    • Planning obligations
    • Planning pre-application advice
    • Planning reserved matters
    • Prior notification of development
    • Removal/variation of planning conditions
    • Residential planning applications
    • Self-build and custom build register
    • Street vote development orders
  • Heritage and Landscape

    Protection and management of the historic and natural environment. Includes listed building consent, conservation area designations, tree preservation orders, landscape character assessments, and ecology and geology.

    This function has no services in the LGA taxonomy. Related services are found under:

    • Conservation and sustainability (Environmental protection)
    • Countryside and farming (Environmental protection)
    • Parks and open spaces (Environmental protection)
    • Local history and heritage (Leisure and culture)
  • Planning Policy (14 services)

    Development and maintenance of the statutory development plan framework. Includes local plans, minerals and waste local plans, neighbourhood planning, community infrastructure levy, spatial development strategies, and land use proposals.

    Services

    • Building and landscape design
    • Conservation areas
    • Environmental delivery plan
    • Land use proposals
    • Local Development Framework
    • Local plans
    • Minerals local plan
    • Neighbourhood planning
    • Planning Governance
    • Spatial development strategy
    • Statutory development plans
    • Transport policy
    • Waste local plan
    • Zoning
  • Planning Services (17 services)

    Support functions for planning including land charges searches, property enquiries, brownfield land registers, self-build and custom build registers, street naming and numbering, and land and property availability information.

    Services

    • Allotments
    • Conservation area planning
    • Dangerous structures
    • Demolished properties - property assessment
    • Demolition control
    • Demolition enforcement
    • Derelict properties
    • Dropped kerbs
    • High hedges
    • Land and property availability
    • Listed building consent
    • Property enquiries certificates
    • Property register
    • Register of land
    • Street names and numbering
    • Tree management
    • Tree preservation orders

Capabilities

Capabilities from the LGAM Capabilities layer that support planning and development services.

  • Payments — application fees, community infrastructure levy, land charges
  • Forms — planning applications, building control submissions, prior notifications
  • Workflow — case management through validation, consultation, and determination stages

Planning datasets

Planning datasets published and maintained by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government on planning.data.gov.uk.

! Warning Data may be incomplete and not yet cover all of England. MHCLG are working to improve availability and quality.
